Choose Your Era

You have been summoned to serve the most powerful office in the nation — not as its occupant, but as its most trusted counsel.

Select an era of American history. Three presidents await your guidance through their most defining crises.

Classified - Advisor Eyes Only
Era I

The Founding Republic

1789 - 1825
The young nation teeters between unity and collapse. Economic panic, foreign threats, and partisan fractures test the very experiment of democracy.
→
Era II

A Nation Divided

1829 - 1877
From the Trail of Tears to the Civil War and Reconstruction, America is torn apart and stitched back together — at enormous human cost.
→
Era III

The Age of Industry & War

1897 - 1945
Monopolies, world wars, economic depression, and the dawn of the nuclear age reshape America's role on the world stage.
→
